author: saiken
description: Score every note's staleness from edits, opens, and inbound links, then work through a decay-ranked review queue. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Israel Avila
manifest.description: Score every note's staleness from edits, opens, and inbound links, then work through a decay-ranked review queue.
manifest.name: Patina

name: Patina

releases.author: israerusan
releases.description:
Score every note's staleness from edits, opens, and inbound links, then work a decay-ranked review queue.

The optional Pro semantic feature uses the Second Read engine — a local, offline sidecar installed in one click and SHA-256-verified. Free features need no engine.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/israerusan/patina/compare/1.0.0...1.0.1
